NETWORK_ERROR.title: Connection Issue
NETWORK_ERROR.message: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection.
suggestions: Check your WiFi or ethernet connection
Check if the server is down

NETWORK_TIMEOUT.title: Request Timeout
NETWORK_TIMEOUT.message: The request took too long to complete.
suggestions: Try again with a smaller request

API_RATE_LIMIT.title: Rate Limit Exceeded
API_RATE_LIMIT.message: Too many requests. Please wait before trying again.
suggestions: Wait a few minutes before retrying

FILE_NOT_FOUND.title: File Not Found
FILE_NOT_FOUND.message: The requested file could not be found.
suggestions: Check if the file path is correct

PERMISSION_DENIED.title: Permission Denied
PERMISSION_DENIED.message: You do not have permission to access this resource.

DISK_FULL.title: Disk Full
DISK_FULL.message: Not enough disk space to complete the operation.
suggestions: Free up disk space by deleting unnecessary files
Move files to an external drive

DATABASE_LOCKED.title: Database Locked
DATABASE_LOCKED.message: The database is currently locked by another process.
suggestions: Wait a moment and try again
Close other instances of the application

DATABASE_CORRUPTED.title: Database Corrupted
DATABASE_CORRUPTED.message: The database file appears to be corrupted.
suggestions: Restore from a backup if available
You may need to reset the application

AUTH_FAILED.title: Authentication Failed
AUTH_FAILED.message: Unable to authenticate with the provided credentials.
suggestions: Verify your API key is correct
Check if your account is active

TOKEN_EXPIRED.title: Session Expired
TOKEN_EXPIRED.message: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
suggestions: Check if your credentials are still valid

LLM_API_ERROR.title: LLM Provider Error
LLM_API_ERROR.message: An error occurred while communicating with the LLM provider.
suggestions: Verify your account has sufficient credits
Try switching to a different provider

LLM_CONTEXT_LENGTH.title: Context Too Long
LLM_CONTEXT_LENGTH.message: The conversation context exceeds the model's maximum length.
suggestions: Use a model with larger context window

LLM_CONTENT_FILTER.title: Content Filtered
LLM_CONTENT_FILTER.message: The request was blocked by content filtering.

BROWSER_NOT_FOUND.title: Browser Not Found
BROWSER_NOT_FOUND.message: The required browser is not installed or cannot be found.

BROWSER_CRASH.title: Browser Crashed
BROWSER_CRASH.message: The browser automation session crashed unexpectedly.
suggestions: Update your browser to the latest version

ELEMENT_NOT_FOUND.title: Element Not Found
ELEMENT_NOT_FOUND.message: Could not find the specified UI element on the page.
suggestions: The page might still be loading
The element selector might be incorrect
The page structure may have changed

AUTOMATION_FAILED.title: Automation Failed
AUTOMATION_FAILED.message: The automation task could not be completed.
suggestions: Check if the application is still running
Verify the automation steps are correct
Try running the automation manually first

UI_ELEMENT_TIMEOUT.title: Element Timeout
UI_ELEMENT_TIMEOUT.message: Waited too long for a UI element to appear.
suggestions: The application might be slow to respond
Increase the timeout duration in settings
Check if the element still exists

OUT_OF_MEMORY.title: Out of Memory
OUT_OF_MEMORY.message: The application ran out of available memory.
suggestions: Close other applications to free up memory
Upgrade system RAM if this occurs frequently

SYSTEM_ERROR.title: System Error
suggestions: Contact support if the issue persists

AGI_PLANNING_FAILED.title: Planning Failed
AGI_PLANNING_FAILED.message: The AGI planner could not create a plan for the goal.
suggestions: Try rephrasing the goal more specifically
Break down complex goals into smaller steps
Check if the LLM provider is available

AGI_EXECUTION_FAILED.title: Execution Failed
AGI_EXECUTION_FAILED.message: The AGI system failed to execute a step.
suggestions: Review the step details in the error log
Check if required tools are available

AGI_TOOL_NOT_FOUND.title: Tool Not Available
AGI_TOOL_NOT_FOUND.message: The required tool is not available or not installed.

UNKNOWN_ERROR.title: Unknown Error
suggestions: Check the error logs for details
Report this issue if it persists
